title: Pandas Optimization: How I Improved Performance
author: Suman Giri
snippets:
import dask.dataframe as dd

# Create a sample dataframe
df = dd.DataFrame({
    'A': range(1000000),
    'B': range(1000000)
})

# Perform an optimized operation
result = df['A'] + df['B']

import pandas as pd

# Create a sample dataframe
df = pd.DataFrame({
    'A': pd.Categorical(['a', 'b', 'c'] * 1000000)
})

# Perform an optimized operation
result = df['A'].cat.codes
